meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Overcome Marketing Gaps for Students
content.seo_description: Learn to use Claude Code and Antigravity to automate marketing workflows. A beginner-friendly guide for students to build apps without marketing expertise.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to launch; you need an automated engine. By leveraging Claude Code to integrate marketing logic directly into your codebase, you transform your app into a self-promoting asset. Use Antigravity to scaffold these growth loops, allowing you to focus on engineering while the AI handles distribution.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks architecting the perfect backend, but the silence of an empty user base is deafening. The 'build it and they will come' myth is the graveyard of student projects. You aren't failing because your code is bad; you are failing because your code lacks a heartbeat that connects with the world.

Today, we bridge that divide. We are going to treat your marketing stack like a technical feature. By integrating Claude Code and Antigravity, we shift from manual promotion to automated growth, turning your project into a high-converting portfolio piece that speaks for itself.

steps.title: Define the Value Proposition Engine
steps.description: Before writing code, use AI to distill your app's core benefit into a high-conversion hook.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project codebase and generate 5 punchy, benefit-driven headlines and a 30-second elevator pitch designed for a landing page.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Generate a marketing meta-tag strategy based on my current codebase files.'

steps.title: Automate Social Proof Integration
steps.description: Build a system that automatically pulls user milestones into your UI to encourage sharing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React component that displays dynamic social proof based on user activity logs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Implement a social-share trigger when a user completes their first milestone.'

steps.title: Implement Automated Content Hooks
steps.description: Use Claude Code to generate SEO-friendly blog content derived from your app's internal documentation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a script that parses my README and documentation to draft a LinkedIn post series.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a utility script that summarizes new feature commits into social media updates.'

steps.title: Configure SEO Meta-Tag Injection
steps.description: Ensure your app is discoverable by automating the generation of optimized OpenGraph tags.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my routing structure and implement a dynamic meta-tag injector for SEO optimization.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Add dynamic SEO meta-tag generation to the main layout component.'

steps.title: Launch Performance Monitoring
steps.description: Set up automated alerts to track user acquisition metrics directly in your terminal.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a dashboard view in my terminal that summarizes daily user sign-up trends from my database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Integrate a CLI-based dashboard to visualize user acquisition metrics.'

pro_tips: Treat your marketing copy as code; version it in Git so you can A/B test iterations.
Use Claude Code to write your own 'How to Use' documentation; if the AI can't explain your app, your users won't get it.
Automate the 'Cold Outreach' email templates using your project's specific technical specs as the value hook.
Don't build a separate marketing site; inject marketing components directly into your app's onboarding flow.
Leverage the 'Claude Code' history to identify which features users ask about most, then prioritize those in your marketing.
content.next_steps: Deploy your project to Vercel, share your public repo on Twitter, and use the automated social proof components you just built to capture your first 100 users.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical foundation to stop hiding behind your keyboard and start shipping products that sell themselves. The gap between a student project and a market-ready app is just one execution cycle away. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
